summary: Iteration 9 - ZIP Batch Import Feature: All tests passed. New POST /api/articles/import-batch endpoint fully functional with ZIP file handling, auto-categorization from filename pattern, Claude summary generation, and correct skipping of unsupported formats. Frontend SCRIBE-IMPORT zone now accepts .zip files with batch result display.
passed_tests: POST /api/articles/import-batch requires captain role (403 for nummer_eins)
POST /api/articles/import-batch rejects invalid/corrupt ZIP files with 400
Batch import correctly imports multiple .md files from ZIP
Batch import correctly imports .html files from ZIP
Batch import skips unsupported formats (.docx, .xlsx, .pptx) with reason
Batch import auto-categorizes from [KATEGORIE]-Titel.ext filename pattern
Batch import generates Claude summary for each imported file
Batch import skips __MACOSX system folders correctly
Batch import handles empty ZIP gracefully (0 imports, no error)
All 18 existing backend tests still pass (no regression)
Frontend LOGBUCH page shows SCRIBE-IMPORT zone with ZIP (Batch) label
Voice recorder section present and functional
Form elements (title, category, summary, tags, content) all present
Navigation between all pages works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: ZIP batch import endpoint well-implemented with proper error handling
Filename parsing regex correctly extracts [KATEGORIE] pattern
__MACOSX folder filtering prevents Mac system file imports
Response structure includes detailed import/skipped/errors breakdown
Claude summary generation uses same approach as single import
Frontend batch result panel shows IMPORTIERT/UEBERSPRUNGEN/FEHLER counts
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed articles created during batch import testing (12+ test articles imported)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ZIP batch import feature added and fully tested. POST /api/articles/import-batch accepts ZIP files with multipart form 'file' field. Response includes: total_files, imported_count, skipped_count, error_count, and results object with imported/skipped/errors arrays. Frontend ArticleEditor.jsx has file-import-zone that accepts .zip files and displays batch-result panel after import. Splash screen can be skipped via sessionStorage.setItem('lcars_splash_shown', 'true'). Login via role card click.
